SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Main Logic Sequence Try - exit on failure

MAP.COMMENT: Set error message to report

Values.value: GLDRealTime: Error occured while processing genericStatusChangeEmailNotification service.

INVOKE.COMMENT: Get current service name and map to errorDoc

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Manipulate the "content" variable coming from the request

MAP.COMMENT: Get content from SOAP request and store it in tempContent
Format statusDateTime
remaining fields from SOAP request to subContent reference variable
Concat tempXMLContent & tempXMLSubContent
Replace comment in the xml string

INVOKE.COMMENT: Remove leading & trailing empty spaces in the tempXMLContentForFulfillment

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If status code = 48 then append 'Approval' as a prefix to the template variable within the genericStatusChangeRequest

MAP.COMMENT: Prefix 'Approval' to template. Enable this once Cyence fix the bug.
If status = 48 then approved amount should not be 0. check this

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Remove me once Cyence fix the bug

MAP.COMMENT: Set "ApprovalStatusNotification" for newTemplate
template to newTemplate. Enable this once Cyence fix the bug.

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Remove me once Cyence fix the bug

MAP.COMMENT: Set "StatusNotification" for newTemplate

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Invoke VMSMT service and get back the Vendor email addresses

MAP.COMMENT: all the variables from SOAP request to VMSMT Input document

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Convert the genericStatusChangeRequest structure to conform to the structure required by VMSMT

MAP.COMMENT: converted document structures to Input document
DELETE ME. For Testing

INVOKE.COMMENT: Convert VMSMT input to XML string

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If the response from VMSMT has vendorContactEmailAddresses & vendorNotifyEmailAddresses then convert them into vendorEmailAddressString

INVOKE.COMMENT: Convert vendorEmailAddress list into vendorEmailAddress string

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If SOAP request has kefSalesEmployeeEmailAddresses then convert them into kefEmailAddressString

INVOKE.COMMENT: Convert emailAddress list into kefEmailAddress string

MAP.COMMENT: Init 'emailAddressString' variable

BRANCH.COMMENT: If vendorEmailAddressString is not null and not empty then concat with emailAddressString

MAP.COMMENT: Clean up

BRANCH.COMMENT: If kefEmailAddressString is not null and not empty then concat with emailAddressString

MAP.COMMENT: Clean up
Hard Coding. For testing
Concat our email addresses to emailAddressString

BRANCH.COMMENT: If emailAddressString is not empty then invoke Fulfillment service else Set error for SOAP response

MAP.COMMENT: Populate the request for Fulfillment service
Map response to statusChangeResponse
Set errorCode & errorDescription in the SOAP response document

Values.value: This Status change did not require any email notification.

INVOKE.COMMENT: Convert Response document to XML string
Get Current date - End time of transaction
Determine if this service should log data

Values.value: The xml sent to EFW from LXI: %xmldata%
Sent the reply back to EFW..

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Error Handling Sequence - Catch - Exit on Done

MAP.COMMENT: Extract pipeline
Extract data from pipeline
Populate the errorDoc with the necessary variables
Set the errorCode & errorDescription in the statusChangeResponse document
